name: Chili Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Chicken stock or water -or- low-sodium chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
These are good either by themselves or as an addition to chili base. (See RECIPE).
1 NIGHT BEFORE, cover beans and peas with water and let stand to soften.
2 Preheat oven to 275°F.
3 Combine beans, ham hock, stock or water and desired salt in a heavy 2-quart ovenproof pot, over medium heat.
4 Cover, bring to a boil and place in the oven.
5 Check the beans every 30 minutes. Add 1/2 cup more stock each time if all the liquid has been absorbed.
6 Cook for 1 1/2 hours or until beans are soft.
